creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to 6yearold from comment #4)

> The author removed all license files from the repository, so the only way to
> find out the license is his site:
> https://www.msoos.org/2016/09/cryptominisat-5-0-1-released-with-mit-license/
> 
> I've filed a bug requsting him to add one, but i don't want it to block the
> update. Let's proceed with the current patch?

LGPL20 still applies, so I've fixed licenses as I've suggested before.
